zh.Caprington Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭艾斯爾卡普林頓 卡素
zh.Branxton, Northumberland, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Wardlaw 4th of Torrie於大約1437年出生在蘇格蘭費伏時，他的父親Henry Wardlaw28歲，母親Margaret Oliphant co-heiress of Dron24歲。他和Lady Margaret Lindsay至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他於1513年登記服兵役。他去世於1513年9月9日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年77歲。

zh-hans.Branxton, Northumberland, England: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry Wardlaw 4th of Torrie于大约1437年出生在苏格兰費伏时，他的父亲Henry Wardlaw28岁，母亲Margaret Oliphant co-heiress of Dron24岁。他和Lady Margaret Lindsay至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他于1513年登记服兵役。他去世于1513年9月9日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wardlaw
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: probably a habitational name from Wardlaw, in Kirkhill, Inverness, which is recorded as Wardelaue in 1202, or perhaps Wardlaw in Ayrs. However, the possibility that the Scottish family is related to the Wardlow family of Wardlow (Derbys) cannot be ruled out. The placenames derive from Old English weard ‘watch’ + hlāw ‘mound, hill’.

variants.name: Wardlow
meanings: English: habitational name from Wardlow in Derbyshire, from Old English weard ‘watch’ + hlāw ‘hill’. Compare Wardlaw .

variants.name: Warden
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a watchman or guard, from Anglo-Norman French wardein, Old French gardein ‘one who keeps guard, a warden’, i.e. a gate-keeper, porter, or sentinel.

English: habitational name from any of various places, for example in Bedfordshire, County Durham, Kent, Northumerland, and Northamptonshire, called Warden, from Old English weard ‘watch’ + dūn ‘hill’. Compare Wardlaw and Wardle 2.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Wardlaw 4th of Torrie was born about 1437, in Fife, Scotland, his father, Henry Wardlaw, was 28 and his mother, Margaret Oliphant co-heiress of Dron, was 24. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Lady Margaret Lindsay. He registered for military service in 1513. He died on 9 September 1513, in Branxton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry Wardlaw 4th of Torrie est né environ 1437, à Fife, Écosse, son père, Henry Wardlaw, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Oliphant co-heiress of Dron, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Lady Margaret Lindsay. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1513. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1513, à Branxton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry Wardlaw 4th of Torrie um 1437 in Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Wardlaw 28 und seine Mutter Margaret Oliphant co-heiress of Dron 24. Er hatte mit Lady Margaret Lindsay mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1513 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 9. September 1513 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Branxton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Wardlaw 4th of Torrie è nato il circa 1437 nel Fife, Scotland, il suo padre, Henry Wardlaw, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Oliphant co-heiress of Dron, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Lady Margaret Lindsay. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1513. Morì il 9 settembre 1513, nel Branxton, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Wardlaw 4th of Torrieが約1437年にスコットランドフィフで生まれた時，父Henry Wardlawは28歳，母Margaret Oliphant co-heiress of Dronは24歳であった。彼はLady Margaret Lindsayとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1513年に兵役登録をした。彼は1513年9月9日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドブランクストンで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Wardlaw 4th of Torrie(이)가 대략 1437년 스컷랜드 피프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Wardlaw(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Oliphant co-heiress of Dron(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Lady Margaret Lindsay(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1513년 9월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 브랜스턴에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Branxton, Northumberland, England: Branxton, Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Wardlaw 4th of Torrie nasceu aproximadamente 1437, em Fife, Scotland, seu pai, Henry Wardlaw, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Oliphant co-heiress of Dron, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Lady Margaret Lindsay. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1513. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1513, em Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry Wardlaw 4th of Torrie родился около 1437 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Henry Wardlaw было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Oliphant co-heiress of Dron, 24. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Lady Margaret Lindsay. В 1513 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 9 сентября 1513 г. в местности бранкстон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Henry Wardlaw 4th of Torrie nació aproximadamente 1437, en Fife, Scotland, su papá, Henry Wardlaw, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margaret Oliphant co-heiress of Dron, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Lady Margaret Lindsay. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1513. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1513, en Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años.
